jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services!
